_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.704), DG-S-008 (DG, cosine: 0.574).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.628). Shared vocabulary: [documentation, technical]. DCWF-only terms [ability, produce] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.946, R=0.871). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Ability to produce technical documentation." and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.755 > STS 0.628 (gap +0.127). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [documentation, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [documentation, technical]. DCWF-only: [ability, produce]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, non].
